template.name: disbursement_ach_per_customer_submission
template.description: Record a single customer's entry in a NACHA ACH file. Zeros out the customer's Pending Disbursements (20102) against the per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104), and mirrors on the allocation ledger by zeroing the customer's FBO Pending Disbursements (21102) against Cash Balances - Clearing (11901).

financial_statements_impact.description: Consumer Pending Disbursements (20102) is debited (zeroing the per-customer disbursement obligation) on the economic ledger.
Per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) is credited (drawing down the per-file clearing balance) on the economic ledger.
Consumer FBO Pending Disbursements (21102) is debited (zeroing the per-customer FDIC position) on the allocation ledger.
Cash Balances - Clearing (11901) is credited (decreasing the clearing-side FDIC asset position) on the allocation ledger.

template.trigger: Per-customer line item in a NACHA ACH file, after the batch header (T5203) has established the per-file clearing balance.

ledger_scope_descriptions.fdic_tracking: FDIC tracking ledger (ID 5002) where the customer's FBO Pending Disbursements is zeroed and Cash Balances - Clearing is credited.
ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where the customer's Pending Disbursements is zeroed and the per-file ACH Clearing Files balance is drawn down.

accounting_treatments.description: Settle the customer's pending disbursement against the per-file ACH clearing balance.
Record the FDIC fund location reclassification from per-customer FBO Pending Disbursements to Cash Balances - Clearing on the allocation ledger.

account_code_validations.description: Consumer Pending Disbursements liability on the economic ledger; debited to zero out the per-customer disbursement obligation.
Per-file clearing instance (Master FBO - ACH Clearing Files) on the economic ledger; credited to draw down the per-file clearing balance.
Consumer FBO Pending Disbursements liability on the allocation ledger; debited to zero out the per-customer FDIC position.
Cash Balances - Clearing on the allocation ledger; credited to record the clearing-side FDIC position.

ach_file_id.description: NACHA ACH file reference used to select the per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) instance being drawn down.

consumer_external_id.description: Consumer entity external identifier for routing to the correct consumer accounts.

entry_reference.description: Deterministic per-entry identifier within the ACH file for idempotency/deduplication.

legs.description: Settle this consumer's pending disbursement against the per-file ACH clearing balance.
Mirror the settlement on the allocation ledger for FDIC fund-location tracking.

examples.name: customer_a_ach_submission_200
examples.description: Customer A's $200.00 entry in ACH file ach-disb-2026-03-01-001. Zeros Pending Disbursements, draws down per-file ACH clearing, zeros FBO Pending Disbursements.

examples.name: customer_b_ach_submission_300
examples.description: Customer B's $300.00 entry in ACH file ach-disb-2026-03-01-001. Zeros Pending Disbursements, draws down per-file ACH clearing, zeros FBO Pending Disbursements.
